title: add podman remote client
body:
podman client that is capable of:
 * images
 * ps
 * rm
 * rmi

this is only a mockup to frame out and prove python library and ssh
tunnelling usage.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude Should this be marked as a WIP, or do you really want to merge?
Id say merge it; it works. And more importantly, it is funcational enough to hand off to @jwhonce
LGTM, and happy green test buttons.  I'd say merge and let @baude and @jwhonce adjust later if necessary.
